ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "applicant_type" TEXT /* Type of applicant (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the applicant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the applicant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subquotas" (
  "subquota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subquota */,
  "subquota_name" TEXT /* Name of the subquota */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subquota */,
  "allocation_limit" REAL /* Maximum allocation limit for the subquota */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subquota */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subquota */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subquota record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subquota record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subquota (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subquota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the application */,
  "subquota_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subquota applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., new, renewal) */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_applications_subquota_id FOREIGN KEY ("subquota_id") REFERENCES subquotas ("subquota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that the allocation was made for */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the applicant */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the allocation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_allocations_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES quota_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "subquota_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subquota that the rule applies to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value used in the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., threshold, percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_rules_subquota_id FOREIGN KEY ("subquota_id") REFERENCES subquotas ("subquota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that the prediction was made for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_amount" REAL /* Predicted amount of the allocation */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES quota_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "subquota_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subquota that the entry belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the entry was made */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the entry was made */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Allocated amount for the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_history_subquota_id FOREIGN KEY ("subquota_id") REFERENCES subquotas ("subquota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "subquota_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subquota that the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., allocation, threshold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_settings_subquota_id FOREIGN KEY ("subquota_id") REFERENCES subquotas ("subquota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
